pageTitle: Our Corporate Partners | Support Us | Dove Cottage
metaDescription: Meet the organisations supporting Dove Cottage Day Hospice through corporate partnerships and community fundraising.
heroImageAlt: Supporter recognition board displaying local business and community partner logos
heroShortDescription: Businesses making a meaningful local impact.
introParagraph1: With less than 4% of our funding coming from the government, we rely heavily on the support from organisations such as these to continue our work and are truly grateful to them all.
introParagraph2: Please take a look at their websites below to see what services they offer.
closingParagraph: If you are an organisation that would like to get involved with supporting the work of Dove Cottage, please visit our corporate partnerships page for more information.
